advantages: Interactive, cell-by-cell iteration with inline outputs and plots.
Persistent kernel keeps expensive resources (models, data) loaded between runs.
Mixes runnable code with rich Markdown narrative for shareable experiments.
Immediate feedback makes prompt and data exploration fast.
disadvantages: Hidden state from out-of-order execution causes non-reproducible results.
Notebooks diff and merge poorly in version control (JSON with outputs).
Encourage sprawling, unstructured code that's hard to test or reuse.
Easy to leak secrets or large outputs into the saved file.
